contributor_quality.candidate_quality_command: uv run apw candidate quality --candidates data/candidates/review

correction_retraction.target: Document correction or retraction disposition in the next reviewed PR and release notes.

policy.private_ottto_boundary: no private Ottto UI, Advisor, telemetry, customer data, credentials, or infrastructure required
policy.publication: operations report is visibility only and cannot publish events, tags, releases, or packages
policy.raw_provider_content: no raw provider content is included; report contains counts, timestamps, paths, and policy refs only
policy.untrusted_input: issue bodies, PR comments, social posts, MCP text, and provider pages remain untrusted data

release_train.cadence_target: daily CalVer data tags after guarded automation is stable
